headline: How It Works
subheadline: A frictionless local LLM pipeline that respects your privacy.

steps.title: Type Your Message
steps.description: Click the pet to open the chat panel. Type naturally — it understands context.

steps.title: Local Processing
steps.description: Your message goes to Ollama running locally. No network calls, no cloud.

steps.title: Stream Response
steps.description: Tokens stream back in real-time. The pet 'speaks' each word as it arrives.
